dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening in your workspace.

quickActions.title: Quick actions

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage how you appear across the workspace.
profile.evaluationEnabledDesc: Your AI-assisted development activity is being evaluated. View your transparency report below.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: API keys authenticate your CLI / scripts to the gateway. Treat them like passwords.
apiKeys.name: Name

createDialog.title: Create API key
createDialog.description: Issue a new key bound to your account. The raw value is shown once after creation.
createDialog.rawWarning: Copy this key now — it will not be shown again.

profileUsage.title: My usage

profileEvaluation.title: My Evaluation
profileEvaluation.subtitle: Your AI-assisted development transparency report.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.subtitle: Workspaces you belong to.
organizations.emptyHintSuperAdmin: Create the first organization to get started.
organizations.emptyHintMember: Ask an administrator to invite you.
organizations.name: Name

overview.subtitle: Account snapshot for this workspace.
overview.upstreamAccountsDesc: Anthropic / OpenAI credentials used to route requests for this organization.

orgOverview.quickLinksDesc: Use the tabs above to manage departments, teams, members, invites, and audit logs.

accountsPage.subtitle: Anthropic credentials used to route requests for this workspace.
accountsPage.cantViewHint: Ask a workspace admin for the account.read permission.

accountGroupsPage.cantViewHint: Ask a workspace admin for the account_group.read permission.

membersPage.emptyHint: Invite teammates from the Invites tab.

departmentsDialog.description: Group related teams under one department.

teamsDialog.description: Create a team in this workspace.

usagePage.noPermission: You do not have permission to view usage for this organization.

invitesDialog.description: Send this link to invite a user into this workspace.
invitesDialog.createdDescription: Share this link with {email}. Link expires in 7 days.
invitesDialog.emailDeliveryNote: Email delivery is not wired yet — copy the link and send it manually.

departments.subtitle: Departments group teams within this workspace.
departments.emptyHint: Create one to start grouping teams.
departments.name: Name

teams.subtitle: Teams are the operating unit. Members belong to teams.
teams.emptyHint: Create your first team to start.
teams.name: Name

memberDetail.noEvaluations: No evaluation reports found for the last 30 days.

accounts.subtitle: Anthropic / OpenAI credentials used to route requests for this organization.
accounts.name: Name
accounts.emptyHint: Add an Anthropic API key or OAuth credential to start routing requests.
accounts.confirmDelete: Remove account "{name}"? This marks it as deleted and unschedulable.
accounts.credentialInvalidTitle: {name}'s API key was rejected — rotate it
accounts.credentialInvalidMultiTitle: {count} API keys were rejected — rotate them
accounts.credentialInvalidBody: The upstream provider rejected the stored API key. Rotate the credential to bring the account back into rotation.
accounts.reonboardWarningBody: The refresh token was rotated by another process (the Claude Code app on the host, or another Caliber instance). Caliber cannot refresh on its own — extract a fresh bundle from your Keychain and rotate the credential to recover.

create.title: New account
create.subtitle: Add upstream credentials so the gateway can route requests for this organization.
create.credentialsOauthHint: Paste the OAuth JSON returned by `claude auth login` — must include `access_token`, `refresh_token`, `expires_at`.
create.platformOpenAIHint: Onboard via API key obtained from a compliant OpenAI org / project.
create.platformAnthropicHint: Anthropic supports both API key and OAuth (claude auth login).
create.typeOauthDesc: Refreshable token bundle from `claude auth login`.
create.typeOauthDisabled: Not available for OpenAI — use API key path.
create.scopeOrgDesc: Any team in this workspace can use this account.
create.scopeTeamDesc: Only the selected team can use this account.
create.credentialApiKeyHint: Paste the raw Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...).
create.credentialApiKeyOpenAIHint: Paste the OpenAI org/project API key (sk-... or sk-proj-...). See docs/admin/openai-account-setup.md for sourcing.

reonboard.title: Re-onboard OAuth credentials
reonboard.description: Replace the rotated bundle for "{name}" with a fresh one from your Keychain.
reonboard.step1Label: 1. Run this in a terminal on the gateway host
reonboard.step1Hint: Reads the Claude Code app's Keychain entry and reshapes it into the JSON shape Caliber stores. Output goes to stdout — copy it into the box below.
reonboard.invalidJson: Not valid JSON — make sure you copied the entire output.
reonboard.permissionFail: You do not have permission to re-onboard this account

rotateDialog.title: Rotate credential
rotateDialog.description: Replace the stored credential for "{name}". The account and its usage history are kept.
rotateDialog.warning: This replaces the stored credential immediately.
rotateDialog.placeholder: Paste the new Anthropic or OpenAI API key

editDialog.title: Edit account
editDialog.schedulableHint: When off, the scheduler skips this account.

accountGroups.title: Account groups
accountGroups.subtitle: Pool upstream accounts of the same platform under a shared rate cap; the gateway scheduler load-balances across members by priority.
accountGroups.name: Name
accountGroups.emptyDesc: Groups let the scheduler load-balance multiple upstream accounts of the same platform under a shared rate cap.
accountGroups.confirmDelete: Delete group "{name}"? Soft-deletes the group and stops the scheduler from picking it. Members are not deleted.
accountGroups.groupNotFoundDesc: The group may have been deleted, or you don't have access to this org.
accountGroups.membersDesc: The scheduler picks among active members by lowest priority first.
accountGroups.viewMembersOnly: You can view members but not modify them. Ask an org admin for

create.title: New account group
create.subtitle: Group accounts together so the scheduler can pool them under a shared rate cap.
create.isExclusiveLabel: Exclusive — members not used by other groups
create.platformAllSamePlatform: All members must be upstream accounts of the same platform — the scheduler dispatches based on group platform.
create.rateMultiplierHint: Scales each member account's effective concurrency. 1.0 = no change.
create.exclusiveHint: When enabled, accounts in this group are NOT used by any other group's scheduler picks.

detail.membersDesc: Lower priority is preferred — the scheduler tries lowest priority first.
detail.noEligibleAccounts: No eligible accounts — every {platform} account in this org is already a member, or there are no {platform} accounts at all. Create one in the Accounts tab first.
detail.settingsDesc: Rename, retune the rate cap, or disable scheduler picks temporarily.
detail.platformFixed: Platform is fixed at {platform} — to change it, delete and recreate the group (members would have to re-add anyway since platform mismatch is rejected).
detail.confirmDelete: Delete group "{name}"? Soft-deletes the group; member accounts are NOT deleted, only their membership.
detail.noMembersYet: No members yet — add one of the eligible {platform} accounts below.
detail.confirmRemoveMember: Remove "{name}" from group "{group}"? The account itself is not deleted.
detail.membersNotByOthers: Members not used by other groups

evaluateAsProject.label: Score as project
evaluateAsProject.helperText: LLM evaluation cost counts against the org's monthly budget.

memberApiKeys.ownDescription: Issued by you for your own use. The raw value is shown once at creation.
memberApiKeys.adminDescription: Active API keys issued by an admin under this organization.
memberApiKeys.name: Name
memberApiKeys.noKeysHint: No API keys yet. Generate one to use the gateway.
memberApiKeys.noKeysForUser: No keys issued for this user yet.
memberApiKeys.confirmRevoke: Revoke key "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

createDialog.title: New API key
createDialog.description: Generate a key to authenticate the Caliber gateway from your CLI or scripts.
createDialog.createdDescription: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again.
createDialog.warning: Save this key now. We can't show it again.
createDialog.routingPolicyOwnHint: Only use upstreams I've registered myself.
createDialog.routingPolicyOwnThenPoolHint: Prefer my own; fall back to the shared pool if I have none.

adminIssueDialog.title: Issue API key
adminIssueDialog.description: Generate a key for {target}. You'll receive a one-time URL to share with them — the raw key is never shown to you.
adminIssueDialog.issuedDescription: Issued to {target}. Share the URL with them through a secure channel.
adminIssueDialog.warning: This URL is valid 24h and can be opened only ONCE. Share it securely — whoever opens it first holds the key.
adminIssueDialog.expireNote: If the user doesn't claim within 24h, the URL expires and a new key must be issued.

upstreams.pageSubtitle: Register and manage your own upstream API credentials. Requests from your API keys set to "own" route only to these.
upstreams.title: Your upstream credentials
upstreams.description: Credentials you've registered. Only you can use them.
upstreams.noneHint: You haven't registered any upstream credentials yet.
upstreams.confirmDelete: Delete the upstream credential "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

registerDialog.title: Register an upstream credential
registerDialog.description: Add your own API key. Requests from your "own"-policy API keys will route to it.
registerDialog.credentialsHintOpenAI: Paste your OpenAI-compatible API key (sk-… / sk-proj-…).

editDialog.title: Edit upstream credential
editDialog.concurrencyHint: Max simultaneous requests to this upstream. Agentic tools (incl. sub-agents) fire many at once — too low gets throttled and retried. 20+ recommended.

rotateDialog.title: Rotate credential
rotateDialog.description: Replace the stored API key for "{name}". The account and its usage history are kept.
rotateDialog.warning: This replaces the stored credential immediately.

oauth.pasteHintAnthropic: After authorizing, paste the code shown on the page.
oauth.pasteHintOpenAI: After authorizing, copy the full localhost URL from the address bar and paste it here.

status.pageSubtitle: Health and recent activity for your own upstreams and usage.

health.title: Credential health
health.description: Status and expiry of the upstreams you registered.
health.empty: You haven't registered any upstream credentials yet.
health.loadError: Couldn't load credential health. Please try again.

errorRate.title: Error rate
errorRate.description: Errors across your requests in the last 24 hours.
errorRate.loadError: Couldn't load error stats. Please try again.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.loadError: Couldn't load recent activity. Please try again.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitle: Requests, token spend, and cost across the organization.

byKey.title: Usage by key
byKey.description: Per-API-key usage (each key usually maps to one project). OAuth/subscription requests cost $0, but request count and tokens are still tracked.

evaluator.title: Evaluator
evaluator.subtitle: Inspect captured request bodies, configure capture and LLM evaluation, manage rubrics, and review cost.

status.title: Evaluator Status
status.cronHealthDesc: Current health and coverage statistics for evaluations.

settings.title: Evaluator Settings
settings.description: Configure content capture and evaluation for this organization.
settings.enableCaptureDesc: Record request and response bodies for this organization.
settings.enableLlmDesc: Run automated evaluations on captured requests using an LLM judge.
settings.captureThinkingDesc: Include extended thinking traces in captured content.
settings.enableFacetDesc: Adds a per-session LLM classification step to enrich evaluation reports with bug-caught / friction signals. Increases LLM cost; requires LLM evaluation to be enabled.
settings.facetModelHint: Haiku is recommended: ~10× cheaper than Sonnet and sufficient for structured extraction.
settings.facetRequiresLlm: Facet extraction requires LLM evaluation to be enabled first.
settings.facetRequiresLlmToast: Facet extraction requires LLM evaluation to be enabled first
settings.monthlyBudgetHint: Leave empty to allow unlimited LLM spend. Recommended for production: set a budget.
settings.overageDegradeDesc: skip over-budget calls, continue with rule-based scoring
settings.overageHaltDesc: stop all LLM evaluation for the rest of the month
settings.haltedNotice: This org is currently halted until next month boundary (UTC).
settings.noBudgetWarning: No budget set. LLM costs are unlimited.
settings.enableLeaderboardDesc: Show an evaluation leaderboard for members of this organization.
settings.wipeCapturesDesc: Immediately expire all captured request bodies for this organization. This cannot be undone.
settings.wipeConfirmDesc: This will immediately expire all captured request bodies for this organization. The data cannot be recovered. Are you sure?

rubrics.title: Rubrics
rubrics.description: Customize how your organization scores AI-assisted development.
rubrics.name: Name
rubrics.emptyHint: Create a custom rubric to define how your organization scores AI usage.
rubrics.confirmDelete: Delete rubric "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
rubrics.cannotDeleteActive: Cannot delete the org's active rubric. Set a different rubric first.

keyScope.title: Project rubric
keyScope.description: Define a custom rubric for this project key. When set, this rubric takes precedence over the org and platform rubric for per-key evaluations.
keyScope.confirmRemove: Remove the custom rubric for "{name}"? The key will fall back to the org or platform rubric.
keyScope.requiresOptInHint: Enable "Score as project" first to author a custom rubric.

editor.newDescription: Define a custom scoring rubric for your organization.
editor.editDescription: Update this rubric's metadata or definition.
editor.facetHeading: Facet (requires facet extraction enabled on the org)

dryRunPreview.title: Dry run preview
dryRunPreview.description: Scores the last 7 days of your usage data against this rubric without saving a report.
dryRunPreview.usageOnlyBody: body signals (keyword, refusal, tool diversity) show zero hits because request body decryption is disabled from the API server. Scores reflect threshold-based metrics only (tokens, cost, cache ratios, model diversity).

costs.title: LLM Cost Dashboard
costs.description: Per-month evaluator LLM spend, broken down by task type and model.
costs.haltedNotice: This org is halted until next month boundary (UTC). LLM evaluation is paused; rule-based scoring continues.
costs.warning80: You've reached 80% of this month's budget.

report.noReports: No evaluation reports found for the last 30 days.
report.rerunQueuedToast: Rerun queued (test mode — queue not yet wired)
report.clickToExpand: Click a row to expand evidence quotes
report.label: Label
report.noEvidence: No evidence quotes available for this section.

profileEval.noEvaluationsDesc: Your first evaluation will be generated by the nightly cron. Check back tomorrow.
profileEval.captureNotEnabledTitle: Content capture is not currently enabled for your organization.
profileEval.captureNotEnabledHint: No evaluation data is being collected. Contact your administrator if you have questions.
profileEval.captureEnabledTitle: Content capture is enabled for your account.
profileEval.captureEnabledBodyDays: Request content associated with your API key is retained for up to {days} days (your organization may configure a shorter retention window). Evaluations are generated automatically by a nightly process using your organization's rubric.
profileEval.captureEnabledFooter: For questions about data retention or to request deletion, contact your organization administrator. You can also use the export and deletion options at the bottom of this page.

facetSummary.title: Facet drill-down
facetSummary.description: Per-session classifications extracted by the LLM facet pipeline for this period.

exportDialog.title: Export My Data
exportDialog.description: Download all your evaluation data as a JSON file
exportDialog.warningDesc: This will export all evaluation reports and body request metadata associated with your account. The file may be large.
exportDialog.included2: Body request metadata (capture dates, retention info)
exportDialog.included3: Full LLM analysis (you always see your own complete data)

deleteRequest.submittedDesc: Your deletion request has been submitted successfully. Your organization administrator will review this request and notify you of the outcome.
deleteRequest.title: Request Data Deletion
deleteRequest.description: Submit a GDPR data deletion request for your account. Your organization administrator must review and approve this request.
deleteRequest.scopeQuestion: What would you like to delete?
deleteRequest.scopeBodiesDesc: Your API request bodies will be deleted. Evaluation reports will be retained for historical records.
deleteRequest.scopeBothDesc: Both your API request bodies and evaluation reports will be deleted completely.
deleteRequest.reasonPlaceholder: Please provide any context for your deletion request (e.g., employment separation, data concerns)…
deleteRequest.disclaimer: Your request will be reviewed by your organization administrator. It may be approved or rejected. You will be notified of the outcome.

leaderboard.rankedSubtitle: Ranked by latest score · last 30 days
leaderboard.noIndividualReports: No individual reports found for this period.
leaderboard.noReports: No evaluation reports found for the last 30 days.

projects.title: Project Scores
projects.description: Per-key scores for API keys opted into project evaluation.
projects.noKeys: No keys opted in for project scoring.
projects.noKeysHint: Toggle "Score as project" on an API key to start tracking per-project scores.
projects.noReport: No report yet. Scores are generated by the nightly cron.

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: Actions taken in this org.
audit.emptyHint: Actions taken in this org will appear here.

signIn.title: Sign in to Caliber
signIn.subtitle: Continue with your provider account.
signIn.footer1: Only invited emails can register and sign in.
signIn.footer2: Contact your organization administrator if you need an invitation.

errors.accessDeniedDesc: Your email has not been invited to any organization. Contact your administrator to obtain an invitation link.
errors.oauthNotLinkedTitle: This email is linked to a different sign-in method
errors.oauthNotLinkedDesc: Please sign in using your previous provider (e.g. Google or GitHub).
errors.verificationDesc: Please try signing in again to receive a fresh verification link.
errors.configurationDesc: Sign-in is currently unavailable. Please try again later or contact your administrator.
errors.defaultDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

invitePage.title: You're invited to {orgName}
invitePage.subtitle: Sign in to claim this invitation.
invitePage.alreadyClaimed: This invitation has already been claimed.
invitePage.wrongUser: This invitation was sent to a different email.
invitePage.errorWrongEmail: This invite was issued to a different email.
invitePage.errorInvalid: This invite is invalid or has expired.

reveal.title: Your new API key
reveal.subtitle: Copy this key now — it will not be shown again.
reveal.signInTitle: Sign in to claim your key
reveal.signInDesc: This URL is tied to your account. Sign in to continue — the admin who issued the key chose the target recipient.
reveal.errorDesc: It may have already been claimed, expired, or been issued to a different user. Ask your admin to issue a new key if you need one.
reveal.warning: This is the only time you'll see this key. Copy it now and store it somewhere safe (password manager or secrets vault).
reveal.claimDesc: An admin issued an API key for your account. Reveal it to copy the key.
reveal.claimWarning: This URL is valid for one-time use. Once you reveal the key you won't be able to do it again — save it immediately.

devices.title: Your devices
devices.description: Enrolled devices ship local CLI transcripts (claude-code, codex) to caliber.
devices.noDevicesHint: No devices enrolled yet. Issue a token to register your first machine.
devices.confirmRevoke: Revoke device "{name}"? It will stop ingesting data immediately.

enrollmentDialog.title: Enroll a new device
enrollmentDialog.description: Issue a one-time token. Paste it into caliber-agent or run the curl one-liner shown next.
enrollmentDialog.issuedDescription: Use this token within one hour to enroll the device.
enrollmentDialog.warning: This token expires at {expiresAt} and is single-use. Treat it like a password.
enrollmentDialog.curlHint: On the device, set CALIBER_API_BASE to your caliber URL before running.

agentConfig.title: Agent settings
agentConfig.intervalHint: How often each device uploads new activity. 30–1800s. Lower = fresher dashboards; higher = lighter.
agentConfig.outOfRange: Value was clamped to the allowed 30–1800s range.

deviceApproval.title: Authorize this device
deviceApproval.subtitle: A CLI on {hostname} is requesting to record your Claude Code and Codex sessions.
deviceApproval.phishingWarning: Only approve if you just ran `caliber login` on THIS device. The device details below are self-reported by the requesting machine and could be forged.
deviceApproval.consentBody: Your full Claude Code and Codex conversations on this machine (with secrets automatically redacted) will be uploaded to your organization, including the past 90 days of history. You can pause anytime with `caliber agent pause` or revoke this device from the dashboard.
deviceApproval.approved: Device authorized. Return to your terminal — it will finish setup automatically.
deviceApproval.notFound: That code is invalid or has expired. Run `caliber login` again.
deviceApproval.signInPrompt: Please sign in to authorize this device.
